Pre Release Version 4.1.0

Version 4.1.0 – 2025/09/11
Version 4.1.0 - 2025/09/24
Version 4.1.0 - 2025/09/30
Version 4.1.0 - 2025/10/14
Version 4.1.0 - 2025/10/27
Version 4.1.0 - 2025/12/18
Version 4.1.0 - 2025/12/19
Version 4.1.0 - 2026/01/08
Version 4.1.0 - 2026/01/16
Version 4.1.0 - 2026/01/23
Version 4.1.0 - 2026/02/02
Version 4.1.0 - 2026/02/13

Feature:
- Add SparkFun VL53L5CX examples
- Add IPv6 example
- Update RTSPImageClassification.ino
- Add FLASH_SAVE function for wifi wpa connect example
- Add HTTPDisplayJPEGContinuousMultitask example
- Add WPA2_EAP example
- Add SD Card OTA example
- Add BMI270 examples
- Add Http Upload Image examples
- Add Infrared and Ambient Light Sensor Features
- Add Ollama LLM example and multithreading example
- Add Websocket Viewer example
- Update GenAIVision example
- Remove Google Line Notify example
- Add Example Guide Links for NightMode and AutoDayAndNight RTSP Examples
- Add GenAIVisionTTS.ino Example‎
- Update Eink_7in5_Ebook Example
- Update HandPresence_Detection.ino
- Add guide links
    - Capture_Image_HTTP_Post_Image_Llava_Server_FASTAPI
    - HTTP_Post_MP4_Whisper_Server_FASTAPI
    - RecordMP4_HTTP_Post_Whisper_Server_FASTAPI
- Update object detection image
    - remove second buffer to prevent memory overflow
- Add Re-align clocks for ReceiveDelay.ino
- Add HX711 apis and examples
- Add NAU7802 apis and examples
- Update mqtt server naming for related examples
- Add Proof of Concept Examples

API Updates:
- Update code base
- Add WiFi_eap related API
- Update FlashMemory.h
- Remove unused files
- Update TCP api related socket, lwip_send
- Add Arduino printf
    - Add log level options for Arduino
- Add wifi driver log options
- Add amb_ard_printf.h to Arduino.h
- Add WiFi_eap related API
- Add SD Card OTA related API functions
- Add cameraClearQItem function
- Add setQLen function for video class
- Add watchdog option APIs
- Add API for camera status check
- Update AUTO_PWM for Ambient Light Sensor API
- Fixed Invalid WiFiAP Channel Issue
- Update printInfo for RTSP showing IP and port at same row
- Add digitalPinToInterrupt(), attachInterrupt(), detachInterrupt()
- Add callback function flag for send and receive
- Update http OTA related api
    - Update OTA api reconnect when server disconnected
- Update wificlient API
    - Update block mode process
    - Update read()
- Add API to Update Video Stream Params and Proof of Concept

Misc:
- Update tool 1.4.6
    - Update voe.bin
- Add ameba_pro2_nn_models-1.0.3
    - Add mobilenetv2
- Add option to enable and disable codebase logs
- Update board.txt
- Update lib
- Update menu options
- Add watchdog option and menu
- Add Workflow to find and summarise hardware library ".h" functions
- Update code base for websocket
- fix multithreading library name
- Minor fix
- Update python scripts for test end points
- Add requirements.txt for Linux setup env
- Update python scripts for test end points
- Add requirements.txt for Linux setup env
- Update AmebaEink readme
- Add src for zip libs
- Add workflow of Auto-update Arduino ZIP libraries
